svg.text: Understands your data. Not just moves it.
Read existing DB or propose new table
Write transform() function for your data
Iterate up to 3×, then execute on all data
🔒 Only 50 sample rows sent to LLM · zero per-row calls
Scales to millions of rows cheaply.
Scripts saved to disk. Inspect, edit
Run fully local with Ollama. Only 50
sample rows ever leave your machine.
Built with Ollama · PostgreSQL · SQLAlchemy · Pydantic · Typer · Python 3.11+
